forks.name: Osaka

architecture.overview: Osaka extends the executable EL spec with stricter transaction caps, blob fee bounds, new CLZ opcode, secp256r1 precompile, and requests hashing so the consensus layer can audit deposits and custody-linked payloads through Engine API exchanges. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/__init__.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

components.name: State Transition
components.description: Applies header validation, enforced RLP block size, blob gas accounting, withdrawals, and request hashing before mutating state roots. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

components.name: Transaction Validation
components.description: Checks Osaka intrinsic gas floor, 2**24 gas cap, nonce bounds, calldata pricing, and blob bundle integrity prior to execution. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py

components.name: Requests Pipeline
components.description: Extracts deposit, withdrawal, and consolidation requests from receipts, encodes them, and computes the block-level requests_hash exposed to the CL. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/requests.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

components.name: Precompile Suite
components.description: Implements P256VERIFY with strict field bounds, constant 6,900 gas charge, and 160-byte input contract to validate secp256r1 signatures without reverts. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/vm/precompiled_contracts/p256verify.py

state_machines.name: Block Execution
inputs: Ordered transactions with blob sidecars [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py
Parent header fields and requests list [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py
outputs: Receipts root and logs bloom [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py
invariants: Total gas used must not exceed the header gas limit or the block is invalid. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

Blob gas used must match header blob_gas_used and stay within MAX_BLOB_GAS_PER_BLOCK. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py
transitions: 1. Validate header envelope and enforce MAX_RLP_BLOCK_SIZE before execution. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S2] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7934

2. Iterate transactions, running Osaka validation then EVM execution with updated gas accounting and requests tracking. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

3. Seal block outputs, recompute trie roots, logs bloom, blob metrics, and aggregate requests_hash for CL consumption. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/requests.py

architecture.data_flow_diagram:
```mermaid
graph TD
  FCU[CL forkchoiceUpdated] -->|payloadAttributes| Builder
  Builder -->|transactions| TxPool
  TxPool -->|validated tx| EL[Osaka State Transition]
  EL -->|requests_hash, receipts| EngineAPI
  EL -->|blob_gas_used/excess| FCU
``` [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md

normative_spec.title: Transaction Validation under Osaka [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py
normative_spec.summary: Nodes must apply Osaka intrinsic gas floors, 2**24 cap, nonce and signature bounds, and blob bundle checks before accepting a transaction for execution. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py
preconditions: Osaka fork flag enabled in chain configuration. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/__init__.py
Typed transaction decoded per EIP envelopes. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py
inputs: Signed or authorized transaction envelope [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/vm/eoa_delegation.py
Current account state and chain config [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py

Blob bundle metadata when transaction type requires [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py
procedure: 1. Decode tx type; reject unknown prefixes or missing authorizations for SetCode transactions. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/vm/eoa_delegation.py

2. Compute intrinsic gas with calldata floor pricing and ensure tx.gas covers both intrinsic and floor costs. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py

3. Enforce TX_MAX_GAS_LIMIT = 16,777,216, nonce < 2**64-1, signature bounds, and balance sufficiency. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py, [S2] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7825

4. For blob transactions, verify versioned hashes, max blob count, fee caps, and inclusion of blob data commitments. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py
postconditions: Validation returns intrinsic gas and calldata floor cost or raises a structured error. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py

errors.when: Blob fee caps below required base price or missing blob data. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py
errors.effect: Reject blob transaction and surface InsufficientMaxFeePerBlobGasError. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

errors.when: Authorization list empty for SetCode transaction. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py
errors.effect: Raise EmptyAuthorizationListError and reject tx. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

normative_spec.rationale: Protects execution layer from DoS and consensus splits by enforcing deterministic bounds on gas, calldata pricing, and blob inclusion semantics. [S1][S2][S3] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py, [S2] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7825, [S3] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7918

normative_spec.title: Block Import and Requests Hashing [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/requests.py
normative_spec.summary: During block import, nodes must cap encoded block size, recompute trie roots, and build requests_hash from deposit, withdrawal, and consolidation side-effects before sealing the header. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/requests.py
preconditions: Parent block finalized and Osaka fork rules active. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

Block body includes receipts for deposit contract events. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/requests.py
inputs: Block header, transactions, withdrawals, receipts tries [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py
Execution receipts with deposit logs [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/requests.py
procedure: 1. Reject blocks whose RLP encoding exceeds MAX_RLP_BLOCK_SIZE (10,485,760 - 2,097,152 safety margin). [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S2] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7934

2. Apply transactions and withdrawals, updating state, blob metrics, and receipts trie; verify gas used and roots match header values. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

3. Parse deposit logs into request payloads, compute SHA2-based requests_hash, and compare to header field. [S1][S2][S3] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/requests.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S3] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7685
postconditions: Block accepted only if roots, blob metrics, and requests_hash align with execution outputs. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

errors.effect: Raise InvalidBlock and reject the payload. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

errors.when: Computed requests_hash differs from header field. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/requests.py
errors.effect: Reject block and signal INVALID_BLOCK via Engine API. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

normative_spec.rationale: Aligns execution outputs with consensus references so Fulu can trust requests commitments and avoid oversized payload DoS. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/requests.py

algorithms.name: Blob Base Fee Update (Osaka) [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/vm/gas.py, [S2] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7918
algorithms.purpose: Compute blob gas price from excess_blob_gas with enforced execution-cost floor. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/vm/gas.py, [S2] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7918
algorithms.notes: Ensure monotonic price evolution and prevent underflow/overflow when updating excess_blob_gas. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/vm/gas.py, [S2] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7918

interfaces.name: eth_config [S1] Sources: [S1] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7910
interfaces.stability: Stable after Osaka activation. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7910
interfaces.response_schema: Returns fork versioning, blob schedule, and gas caps keyed by fork name. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7910, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/__init__.py
errors: InvalidParams when params array non-empty. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7910
InternalError if fork table unavailable. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7910
interfaces.notes: Clients must surface Osaka gas caps and blob schedule for tooling parity. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7910, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/__init__.py

interfaces.name: engine_newPayloadV3 [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md
interfaces.sequence_diagram:
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  CL->>EL: engine_newPayloadV3(payload, versioned_hashes, parent_beacon_root, execution_requests)
  EL-->>CL: VALID
  CL->>EL: engine_forkchoiceUpdatedV3(state, payloadAttributes)
  EL-->>CL: PayloadStatus(executionStatus, blobStatus)
``` [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md
interfaces.notes: Osaka must verify blob metrics and requests_hash before acknowledging payload to Fulu. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md

wire_protocol.notes: Osaka references eth/69 history expiry and relies on CL PeerDAS topics for blob propagation handled in Fulu networking. [S1][S2][S3] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/__init__.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md, [S3] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7642

constants.name: TX_MAX_GAS_LIMIT
constants.notes: Defines the 2**24 cap enforced during validation. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py, [S2] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7825

constants.name: MAX_RLP_BLOCK_SIZE
constants.notes: 10,485,760 byte hard cap minus 2,097,152 safety margin per Osaka. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S2] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7934

constants.name: BLOB_COUNT_LIMIT
constants.notes: Blocks must not carry more than six blobs under Osaka. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

constants.name: GAS_P256VERIFY
constants.notes: Fixed gas charged before P256 signature verification. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/vm/gas.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/vm/precompiled_contracts/p256verify.py

invariants: Engine must emit requests_hash consistent with parsed deposit events. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/requests.py

MODEXP execution must respect tightened bounds to avoid underpriced inputs. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/vm/gas.py, [S2] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7883

CLZ opcode returns 256 when operand is zero, ensuring consensus alignment. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/vm/instructions/__init__.py, [S2] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7939

user_flows.title: [Client] Osaka Payload Build [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py
preconditions: Osaka rules activated and Engine API authenticated. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/__init__.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py
steps: 1. Tx pool filters incoming tx via OSK-TX-VALIDATION and queues blob sidecars. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py

2. Builder selects transactions, applies state transition, and records requests outputs. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/requests.py

3. Engine returns payload via get_payload including blob metrics. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

4. Consensus layer submits engine_newPayloadV3 and awaits VALID status. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py
postconditions: Payload ready for forkchoiceUpdated with matching blob and request commitments. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md

worked_examples.title: Calldata Floor Gas Rejection [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py
worked_examples.scenario: User submits a blobless transaction with 1,024 non-zero calldata bytes. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py
worked_examples.given: Intrinsic gas = 21,000; calldata floor adds 4,096 tokens * 10 gas. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py
worked_examples.when: If supplied gas < 61,000, validation raises InsufficientTransactionGasError. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py
worked_examples.then: Transaction dropped before execution, preventing state changes. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py

edge_cases: SetCode transactions without at least one authorization MUST trigger EmptyAuthorizationListError and fail. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

Blob transaction carrying >6 versioned hashes MUST raise BlobCountExceededError. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

P256VERIFY input shorter than 160 bytes MUST return empty output without reverting. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/vm/precompiled_contracts/p256verify.py

compatibility.cross_layer: Osaka exposes requests_hash and blob gas metrics that Fulu verifies via engine_newPayload and process_execution_payload, so both layers must agree on hash construction and blob limits. [S1][S2][S3] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/requests.py, [S3] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md

since_previous.summary: Refactored fork metadata into namespace package, clarifying Osaka module layout. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/commit/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a
Reorganized forks directory to prepare for Osaka inclusion. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/commit/12cc993674d3ffa6e7c4e50647c197ae7148144f

breaking_changes: Enforced TX_MAX_GAS_LIMIT per EIP-7825 requires client config updates. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7825, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py

MAX_RLP_BLOCK_SIZE enforcement per EIP-7934 affects block production and sync. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7934, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

Mandatory requests_hash field couples EL outputs to CL processing per EIP-7685. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7685, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

bug_bounty.scope: Execution clients implementing Osaka, executable spec, and associated test vectors are in scope. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://ethereum.org/en/bug-bounty/, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/__init__.py
bug_bounty.impact: Consensus faults, payload invalidation, or DoS due to Osaka gas, blob, or requests handling qualify for rewards. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://ethereum.org/en/bug-bounty/, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py
bug_bounty.exclusions: UI, telemetry, or documentation-only findings remain out of scope. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://ethereum.org/en/bug-bounty/
bug_bounty.reproduction: Proofs must include reproducible payload or transaction demonstrating Osaka rule violation on supported clients. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://ethereum.org/en/bug-bounty/
bug_bounty.reporting: Report privately via bounty.ethereum.org or bounty@ethereum.org with optional PGP per EF policy. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://ethereum.org/en/bug-bounty/
bug_bounty.rewards: Rewards follow EF tiers scaled by consensus impact and ease of exploitation. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://ethereum.org/en/bug-bounty/

forks.name: Fulu

architecture.overview: Fulu augments the beacon chain with PeerDAS data column sampling, proposer lookahead storage, and extended execution payload validation including blob schedule control and execution_requests forwarding. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md

components.name: Beacon State
components.description: Extends BeaconState with proposer_lookahead array, blob parameters, and execution payload header fields for PeerDAS enforcement. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/fork.md

components.name: PeerDAS Core
components.description: Defines custody groups, sampling requirements, DataColumnSidecar format, and reconstruction helpers for erasure-coded blob data. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md

components.name: Networking
components.description: Upgrades gossip, Req/Resp, and discovery protocols with data_column_sidecar topics, custody_group_count metadata, and Status v2 earliest_available_slot. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md

components.name: Validator Duties
components.description: Adjusts custody obligations, payload requests via GetPayloadResponse, and sidecar publishing/retention for validators. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/validator.md

state_machines.name: process_execution_payload
inputs: BeaconBlockBody carrying blob_kzg_commitments and execution_requests [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md
outputs: Notification to execution engine via verify_and_notify_new_payload [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md
invariants: len(blob_kzg_commitments) must not exceed get_blob_parameters(epoch).max_blobs_per_block. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7892

execution_engine.verify_and_notify_new_payload must succeed or block processing aborts. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md
transitions: 1. Check parent hash, prev_randao, and timestamp consistency. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md

2. Enforce blob commitment limit via blob parameters schedule. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7892

3. Call execution engine with versioned hashes and execution_requests, then cache payload header. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md

architecture.data_flow_diagram:
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  Validator->>CL: Propose beacon block + data_column_sidecars
  CL->>EL: engine_newPayloadV3(payload, versioned_hashes, execution_requests)
  EL-->>CL: VALID
  Peer->>Validator: data_column_sidecar gossip
  Validator-->>Peers: Req/Resp DataColumnSidecarsByRange
``` [S1][S2][S3] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md, [S3] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/validator.md

normative_spec.title: PeerDAS Custody Sampling [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md
normative_spec.summary: Nodes must advertise custody_group_count, join corresponding subnets, and sample at least SAMPLES_PER_SLOT columns, escalating to reconstruction if coverage drops. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md
preconditions: Node has computed custody groups via get_custody_groups. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md
inputs: Column subscriptions and sidecar feeds [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md
procedure: 1. Determine custody groups and columns using get_custody_groups and compute_columns_for_custody_group. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md

2. Join data_column_sidecar_{subnet_id} topics for assigned groups and begin sampling >= max(SAMPLES_PER_SLOT, custody_group_count). [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md

3. Validate sidecars via verify_data_column_sidecar, KZG proofs, and inclusion proof before marking samples available. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md

4. If coverage < threshold, reconstruct missing columns via recover_matrix and rebroadcast if subscribed. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md
postconditions: Node updates custody records and exposes availability to peers. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md

errors.when: Sidecar fails structural or KZG verification. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md
errors.effect: Reject gossip message and penalize peer per scoring rules. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md

errors.when: Node fails to fetch required samples per slot. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md
errors.effect: Client must trigger recovery or mark column unavailable impacting attestations. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/validator.md

normative_spec.rationale: Ensures data availability guarantees and resilience against partial sidecar loss. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md, [S2] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7594

normative_spec.title: Proposer Lookahead Maintenance [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/fork.md
normative_spec.summary: Beacon nodes must maintain proposer_lookahead across epochs and verify proposer indices for sidecar validation. [S1][S2][S3] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/fork.md, [S3] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md
preconditions: State upgraded via upgrade_to_fulu with proposer_lookahead initialized. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/fork.md
inputs: Current epoch and custody scheduling parameters [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md
procedure: 1. During epoch processing, run process_proposer_lookahead to refresh indices for (MIN_SEED_LOOKAHEAD+1)*SLOTS_PER_EPOCH slots. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md

2. When validating data_column_sidecar, confirm proposer_index matches lookahead entry for slot. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md

3. If mismatch detected, queue sidecar until proposer shuffling confirmed or reject if proven invalid. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md
postconditions: Lookahead array stays aligned with fork choice and custody validations. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md

errors.when: proposer_index differs from expected index for slot. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md
errors.effect: Client ignores sidecar until proposer mapping recomputed. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md

normative_spec.rationale: Provides deterministic proposer verification for PeerDAS sidecars and attestation duties. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md

algorithms.name: Custody Assignment [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md
algorithms.purpose: Assign custody groups and columns per node deterministically. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md
algorithms.notes: Avoids duplicates, supports super-full nodes, and scales with NUMBER_OF_CUSTODY_GROUPS. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md

interfaces.name: GET /eth/v2/beacon/blocks/{slot} [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md
interfaces.notes: Responses include blob_kzg_commitments and execution_requests needed for Osaka verification. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md

interfaces.name: DataColumnSidecarsByRange v1 [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md
interfaces.notes: Serves DataColumnSidecar payloads over SSZ chunks within MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS window. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md

wire_protocol.notes: Nodes must validate subnet routing, anti-equivocation, and proposer signatures before forwarding sidecars. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md

constants.name: SAMPLES_PER_SLOT
constants.notes: Minimum samples honest node must download each slot. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md

constants.name: NUMBER_OF_CUSTODY_GROUPS
constants.notes: Total custody groups available across PeerDAS network. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md

constants.name: DATA_COLUMN_SIDECAR_SUBNET_COUNT
constants.notes: Number of gossip subnets dedicated to column distribution. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md, [S2] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7594

constants.name: MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS
constants.notes: Retention window for serving DataColumnSidecar requests. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md

invariants: Proposer lookahead array length equals (MIN_SEED_LOOKAHEAD+1)*SLOTS_PER_EPOCH. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/fork.md

earliest_available_slot in Status v2 must reflect oldest stored data column sidecars. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md

Custody requirement for validator-attached nodes scales with effective balance. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/validator.md

user_flows.title: [Validator] PeerDAS Sampling Cycle [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/validator.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md
preconditions: Validator metadata advertises custody_group_count >= VALIDATOR_CUSTODY_REQUIREMENT. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/validator.md
steps: 1. At slot start, compute sampling groups using total_node_balance derived requirement. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/validator.md

2. Subscribe to required data_column_sidecar subnets and request missing columns. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/validator.md

3. Verify sidecars and record custody proofs; reconstruct if partial coverage. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/validator.md
4. Publish attestations only if sampling thresholds satisfied. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/validator.md
postconditions: Validator ready to attest with availability evidence or abstain if data incomplete. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/validator.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md

worked_examples.title: Sampling with Partial Sidecar Loss [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md
worked_examples.scenario: Node misses two custody groups due to slow gossip. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md
worked_examples.given: custody_group_count = 8 requiring >=8 samples per slot. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/validator.md
worked_examples.when: Node retrieves 6 sidecars via gossip and requests remaining 2 via DataColumnSidecarsByRange. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md
worked_examples.then: If Req/Resp succeeds before attestation deadline, node attests; otherwise it must abstain to avoid invalid vote. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/validator.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md

edge_cases: Sidecar with empty kzg_commitments list must be rejected before gossip propagation. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md

Node advertising reduced custody_group_count must still serve historical higher count. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/validator.md

BlobSidecarsByRange requests beyond retention window may return empty without peer penalty. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md

compatibility.cross_layer: Fulu verifies Osaka requests_hash, blob_gas_used, and excess_blob_gas through engine APIs while enforcing blob schedule via get_blob_parameters. [S1][S2][S3] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S3] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7892

since_previous.summary: Adjusted pyspec test generation to gate ssz_static creation in generator mode, keeping PeerDAS fixtures lean. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/commit/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20
Forwarded verbose flag to pyspec rebuild step, aiding debug of Fulu generators. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/commit/1af06e9781ccc8471b53166d5e7109478ac5d874

breaking_changes: DataColumnSidecar gossip replaces blob_sidecar topics, requiring networking upgrades. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md, [S2] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7594

Status v2 earliest_available_slot field mandated for PeerDAS availability tracking. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md

Validators must satisfy upgraded custody requirements tied to effective balances. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/validator.md

bug_bounty.scope: Consensus clients implementing Fulu networking, PeerDAS sampling, and proposer lookahead fall within EF bounty scope. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://ethereum.org/en/bug-bounty/, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md
bug_bounty.impact: Findings causing consensus splits, invalid availability votes, or custody bypass qualify for higher tiers. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://ethereum.org/en/bug-bounty/, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md
bug_bounty.exclusions: Cosmetic issues in specs or non-security documentation remain out of scope. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://ethereum.org/en/bug-bounty/
bug_bounty.reproduction: Reports must include reproducible beacon node traces or failing test vectors demonstrating PeerDAS or lookahead faults. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://ethereum.org/en/bug-bounty/, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md
bug_bounty.reporting: Submit via bounty.ethereum.org or bounty@ethereum.org following responsible disclosure timelines. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://ethereum.org/en/bug-bounty/
bug_bounty.rewards: Rewards mirror EF consensus bounty tiers scaled by slashable fault risk. [S1] Sources: [S1] https://ethereum.org/en/bug-bounty/

interfaces.name: Engine API / Fork Choice [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py
preconditions: EL and CL share JWT auth and advertise matching fork versions. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/__init__.py
interfaces.sequence_diagram:
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  CL->>EL: engine_newPayloadV3(payload, hashes, parent_root, execution_requests)
  EL-->>CL: PayloadStatus(VALID|INVALID, blobStatus)
  CL->>EL: engine_forkchoiceUpdatedV3(state, payloadAttributes)
  EL-->>CL: PayloadId / SYNCING
``` [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py
errors: INVALID_PARAMS when payload structure malformed. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

SYNCING when EL behind finalized head. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

INVALID_BLOCK_HASH when requests_hash or blob metrics mismatch. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py
interfaces.timeouts: Clients should retry forkchoiceUpdated if EL does not respond within slot time, backing off exponentially. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py
interfaces.notes: Fulu relies on Osaka to reject invalid blob bundles and publish execution_requests for CL processing. [S1][S2][S3] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S3] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/requests.py

cross_layer.data_availability: Osaka enforces blob fee floors and blob count limits while Fulu spreads columns across custody groups; together they guarantee availability via pricing and PeerDAS sampling. [S1][S2][S3] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/vm/gas.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md, [S3] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md

security_requirements.description: Execution clients must enforce Osaka gas caps, block size, and requests hashing before exposing payloads to consensus. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/transactions.py

Consensus clients must validate PeerDAS sidecars and meet sampling thresholds before attesting to block availability. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/das-core.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/validator.md

Engine API interactions must keep CL and EL fork choice aligned, rejecting payloads with mismatched blob metrics or requests_hash. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/fork.py

Blob fee computation must remain monotonic with the Osaka minimum to prevent economic attacks or underflows. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/5ddb904fa7ba27daeff423e78466744c51e8cb6a/src/ethereum/forks/osaka/vm/gas.py, [S2] https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7918

Proposer lookahead must be reproducible from beacon state so peers can detect equivocation or invalid sidecars. [S1][S2] Sources: [S1] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/beacon-chain.md, [S2] https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/340d23358a0cdb4f4b547226dadd36d1cf775f20/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md
